'''Qelah Kwaad''' was a [[Master Shaper]] of the [[shaper caste]]. The [[Domain Kwaad|Domain sister]] of [[Mezhan Kwaad]], Kwaad was constantly forced to make up for Mezhan's heresy. However, she was appointed the replacements of [[Nen Yim]] and [[Yal Phaath]], both in filling the [[Eighth cortex]] and the [[Terraforming/Legends|worldshaping]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] into Yuuzhan'tar. Kwaad also produced the [[mabugat kan]] and the [[Slayers]]. During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], Kwaad was captured by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] at the [[Well of the World Brain]], and was forced to help the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] Forces in pacifying the [[World Brain]]. Kwaad was one of the Yuuzhan Vong who went on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].

==Personality and traits==
Qelah Kwaad had a fearsome appearance.<ref name="TUF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Qelah Kwaad first appeared in [[Greg Keyes]]' [[2003]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''.<ref name="TFP">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''</ref>
